applicationWindow.notes: 11 PM MDT cutoff. Big game (deer, elk, pronghorn, sheep, goat, moose, bison) shares the Apr 23 deadline. 2026: NEW application vendor — Aspira at utahdraws.com (replaces old system). Mandatory harvest reporting with fines for general-season deer/elk hunters starting 2026.

secondaryDraw.notes: Antlerless application window Jun 9–23, also a second-chance window to buy bonus/preference points if you missed the main draw. Antlerless results emailed by Jul 8.

nr.notes: NR fees increased significantly Sep 2025: general-season elk $613 → $849 (any-bull or spike units, same fee). Limited-entry elk $1,050 → $1,950. NR hunting license $147. App fee $21/species. Bonus/preference point-only purchase $15/species. 2.2% processing fee on all transactions.

pointSystem.notes: Bonus points used for limited-entry and once-in-a-lifetime species. Preference points used for general-season hunts. 5-year wait after a successful limited-entry elk draw before you can apply again. Second chance to buy points runs Jun 9–23 (antlerless application window).

otc.notes: General-season elk is effectively OTC (first-come-first-served, not a draw). General archery elk permits on sale Jul 7. Any-bull general elk on sale Jul 9 (15,000-tag NR-eligible quota — did NOT sell out in 2024 or 2025). Spike general elk on sale Jul 16 (15,000 quota). Private-lands cow elk + leftover antlerless on sale Jul 28. E-tagging via the Utah Hunting and Fishing app.

2ndRifle.notes: Late any-legal-weapon — general any-bull units. Spike units run Oct 3–15 (combined window).

applicationWindow.notes: 11 PM MDT cutoff. Shares the Apr 23 big game deadline. New vendor (Aspira/utahdraws.com) starting 2026. Mandatory harvest reporting with fines starting 2026.

secondaryDraw.notes: Antlerless window Jun 9–23, also second chance to buy points. Antlerless results by Jul 8.

nr.notes: NR fees increased Sep 2025: general-season deer $418 → $599. Limited-entry deer $670 → $1,070. NR hunting license $147. App fee $21/species. 2.2% processing fee. CWD testing required for the Ogden unit general-season any-legal-weapon hunt.

pointSystem.notes: Bonus points for limited-entry; preference points for general-season. 5-year wait after a successful limited-entry deer draw before re-applying. Second-chance points purchase runs Jun 9–23.

archery.notes: General-season. Extended archery in some areas runs Sep 12 – Nov 30.

applicationWindow.notes: 11 PM MDT cutoff. Once-in-a-lifetime species — verify the OIAL list at wildlife.utah.gov before applying.

nr.notes: Tag-if-drawn price NOT independently verified for 2026 — confirm at wildlife.utah.gov/guidebooks/biggameapp.pdf before applying. NR hunting license $147, app fee $21, point-only $15.

pointSystem.notes: OIAL — once you draw, you cannot apply for moose again regardless of harvest success. Second-chance points purchase runs Jun 9–23.

applicationWindow.notes: 11 PM MDT cutoff. Once-in-a-lifetime species. Henry Mountains and Antelope Island herds.

nr.notes: Tag-if-drawn price NOT independently verified for 2026 — confirm at wildlife.utah.gov/guidebooks/biggameapp.pdf before applying.

pointSystem.notes: OIAL — once drawn, cannot apply again.
